title: FoodBuffs
description: A simple plugin that aims to make the more 'complicated' foods more useful.
body: When a player consumes either rabbit stew or beetroot soup, they will receive Regeneration II and Saturation II for 2 seconds. The purpose of this plugin is to enhance the usefulness of these two food items in a simple and straightforward way. It's a hassle-free plugin that you can easily install and use without any complicated settings.
